# Borg

Borg is failure memory for AI coding agents.

Canonical repo: https://github.com/borg-farther/Borg-Directory
Install package: agent-borg
CLI commands: borg, borg-mcp, borg-doctor
MCP server command: borg-mcp
Python: 3.10+

Day-one value path:
1. pipx install agent-borg
2. borg rescue "ModuleNotFoundError: No module named flask" --short
3. Expect ACTION / STOP / VERIFY / CONFIDENCE, or NO_CONFIDENT_MATCH.

Current rollout boundary:
- Controlled first-10 public-package beta is closed right now. agent-borg==3.3.18 is the published runtime-canary-proven package (not current for this post-tag source line); exact-version fresh-install/stdio MCP/generated-rules/OpenClaw runtime canary proof is green. Cap is 0 until served-runtime freshness and first-10 external-user evidence gates are green.
- Do not claim public self-serve launch, 100 real users, served remote MCP, or measured external lift until row-derived external-user evidence passes.

Useful docs:
- README: https://github.com/borg-farther/Borg-Directory#readme
- MCP setup: https://github.com/borg-farther/Borg-Directory/blob/main/docs/MCP_SETUP.md
- Security model: https://github.com/borg-farther/Borg-Directory/blob/main/docs/SECURITY_HARDENING_BASELINE.md

Verification commands:
- python eval/run_first_user_release_gate.py
- python eval/run_readiness_gates.py
- python eval/real_user_rollout_gate.py
- python -m pytest -q tests/packaging/test_distribution_readiness.py tests/packaging/test_public_repo_surface.py
